message:
test(connectors): Enhanced connector tests with filtering and fixtures

Expands test coverage for Cline and Codex connectors with timestamp
filtering validation and improved fixture handling:

Cline Connector Tests (connector_cline.rs):
- cline_parses_fixture_task: Validates parsing of fixture data
- cline_respects_since_ts_and_resequences_indices: Tests temporal
  filtering with since_ts parameter and verifies message indices
  are correctly resequenced after filtering (idx starts at 0)
- Prefers ui_messages.json over api_conversation_history.json
  to avoid duplicate messages and prioritize user-facing content

Codex Connector Tests (connector_codex.rs):
- codex_parses_fixture_session: Validates Codex session parsing
- codex_since_ts_filters_messages: Tests temporal filtering
- Verifies correct handling of Codex-specific metadata fields

Test Infrastructure:
- Uses tempfile for isolated test directories
- Sets HOME env var to sandbox storage_root resolution
- Validates both message content and structural metadata
- Tests idx field resequencing after filter application

These tests ensure connectors correctly handle incremental
scanning scenarios where only recent messages are needed,
a critical feature for efficient watch mode updates.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
